name: @intentsolutionsio/api-throttling-manager
description: Manage API throttling with dynamic rate limits and quota management

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install api-throttling-manager\\n  or /plugin install api-throttling-manager@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
